description: Inputs that the false-claims family must (or must not) match.
should_match: doctors don't want you to know this
they don't want you to know the truth
this one simple trick cures aging
medically confirmed fact that herbs work
research proves definitively that vaccines cause harm
the earth is flat and proven
no side effects guaranteed at all
the government is hiding the truth
big pharma is covering up the cure
what doctors won't tell you about diet
what they don't tell you about news
should_not_match: this herb may help with mild symptoms
the trick to good baking is butter
side effects are listed on the label
what the report says is troubling
